specs.title: dashboard renders all seeded projects
open a project → summary then timeline; panes aligned on REAL data
summary text saves to localStorage
FIX7(module): a pointercancel clears the drag guard and un-freezes background sync
FIX7(bar): a pointercancel clears the guard even under setPointerCapture
FIX7(central-guard): the guard latches on a handle, clears on cancel, and can never stick
drag the End header before the Feature header and persist colOrder
dropping a column back on itself is a no-op
dragging the resize handle widens the column and writes ui.colW only (not the doc)
enabling wrap grows a long-description row and re-syncs the right pane
FIX1: a malicious start date is HTML-escaped (no injected element, no script)
FIX2: summary text is persisted when navigating to history (not dropped)
FIX3: a live drag sets the interaction guard so a storage adopt is deferred
FIX4: a failed cloud push clears pushPending (no permanent adoption block)
FIX5: a failed localStorage write shows a warning toast (not silent)
FIX6: resizing a column in one project does not affect another
grip + up/down buttons exist with Thai tooltips on every module row
drag a MAIN before and after another (both directions) + alignment
dragging a MAIN block carries its sub-modules as a unit
dragging a SUB onto a MAIN row re-parents it as that main's first sub
dragging a SUB next to another SUB adopts that sub's parent
feature-row drag-reorder still works (no regression)
moddown/modup move a MAIN block past the adjacent MAIN block
modup swaps a SUB with its adjacent sibling only
segmented control + parent select creates a sub under the chosen main
editing a MAIN that has subs DISABLES the Sub-Module option with the Thai hint
parent <select> excludes the module being edited
sub rows carry subMod/subScope/subEnd classes with visible pseudo-element rails
padding-left / chip offset grows one step per hierarchy level
delete a MAIN with subs → confirm text + subs promoted to main
collapsing a MAIN hides only its own features; subs stay visible
Excel Export button is present (intact)
progress panel prefixes sub-module rows with ↳
create a sub, reload, and render order + parentId are identical
no request ever reaches the production Worker (all aborted)
wide bar: start scrolled off-left → label slides to stay just inside the viewport
scroll back to 0 → the slide transform is cleared (label sits at the bar start)
scrolled past the clamp → label clips and the hover bubble shows the full name
small bar (narrower than its label) still shows the hover bubble
left/right pane vertical alignment still holds after a horizontal scroll
